programme.title: Chris Van Tulleken

programme.title: Walter Isaacson

programme.title: Dr. Anna Lembke
programme.desc: Dr Anna Lembke is Professor of Psychiatry at Stanford University School of Medicine and Chief of the Stanford Addiction Medicine Dual Diagnosis Clinic. She is the author of bestselling books such as, ‘Dopamine Nation: Finding Balance in the Age of Indulgence'.

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Adam DeVine Gets Patriotic While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: DeVine takes on the wings of death in the first-ever "Hot Ones" Fourth of July special. Along the way, he channels Macho Man Randy Savage, discusses his hilarious "Pitch Perfect" audition and explains why his dad hung up on Joe Biden.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Ed Helms Needs a Mouth Medic While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: How is Ed Helms with spicy food? Find out as the man behind Andy Bernard discusses banjos, boiled peanuts and the art of the ad read.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Naomi Campbell Almost Faints While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: See how this runway GOAT handles the levels of spice while answering questions about the evolution of the supermodel and her love of foods from around the world.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Big Sean Goes On a Spiritual Journey While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Big Sean and Sean hang out over hot wings. The Detroit emcee discusses ranch life with Kanye West, breaks down hip-hop's love of Stan Van Gundy and struggles to maintain his Buddha-like calm.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Kid Cudi Goes to the Moon While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Kid Cudi is a Grammy Award-winning artist and multi-hyphenate entertainer. He takes on the wings of death while discussing his brand-new album and animated TV special of the same name.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Casey Neistat Melts His Face Off While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Over the years, Casey Neistat's pulled some insane stunts on his channel, from hanging out of helicopters to skateboarding behind a Lamborghini. Casey and Sean Evans go sauce for sauce, diving into the state of media and more.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Jennifer Garner Says "Golly" While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Garner battles the wings of death and discusses life on the farm, the legacy of "13 Going on 30" and her latest film, "Yes Day."

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Andrew Zimmern Has a Bucket List Moment While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern may have traveled the globe eating chilies in Thailand, but he's never faced Da Bomb and the Last Dab: Apollo. Watch him share wisdom on everything from the cultural significance of supermarkets to birria tacos.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Olivia Rodrigo Burns Her Lips While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: The pop star of the moment, Olivia Rodrigo, takes on the wings of death and discusses everything from lyricism to ghost stories to the appeal of Trader Joe's.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: David Dobrik Experiences Real Pain While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Vlog Squad leader David Dobrik takes on the wings of death and discusses everything from collaborating with Justin Bieber to meeting Robert Downey Jr. and his dreams of hosting a late-night show.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Daniel Kaluuya Listens to His Ego While Eating Spicy Wings

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Derrick Lewis Is Not Okay While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: "The Black Beast" tries to withstand body blows and head kicks from the wings of death. Along the way, the Houston native discusses golf, turkey legs and the art of knocking people out.

programme.title: Ria Lina: Rebellion
programme.desc: Following her killer debut tour last year, the 'fearless, provocative, and very funny' Ria Lina (Scotsman) realises that she is ready to rebel. Named by the Evening Standard as one of the Hottest Comedians You Should Be Watching Now, expect a relentless stream of hilarity as Ria explores the delight of throwing life up in the air after years of following the rules.

programme.title: The I.T. Crowd
programme.desc: Jen introduces Roy and Moss to a new social website.

programme.title: Growing Up Smith
programme.desc: In 1979, an Indian family moves to America with hopes of living the American Dream. While their 10-year-old boy Smith falls head-over-heels for the girl next door, his desire to become a "good old boy" propels him further away from his family's ideals than ever before.

programme.title: Aloha
programme.desc: A military contractor returns to the site of his greatest triumph and re-connects with a past love.

programme.title: The I.T. Crowd
programme.desc: Jen, Roy, and Moss find their lives moving in different directions after a disappointing settlement.

programme.title: The I.T. Crowd

programme.title: Rosco Mcclelland: How Could Hell Be Any Worse?
programme.desc: The winner of the 2025 Sir Billy Connolly Spirit of Glasgow Award, Rosco McClelland brings his brand new show for 2025. Twice nominated for Best Newcomer at the Scottish Comedy Awards, McClelland is rapidly becoming one of comedy's brightest stars.

programme.title: Students Face The World's Toughest Exam
programme.desc: In a dystopian future where failed exams mean execution, Carson, the Governor's son, discovers the system is rigged. With his genius friend Maya and a tenacious journalist, he exposes the corruption, fighting to save his loved ones and ignite a revolution.

programme.title: 13-Year-Old Obsessed with VR
programme.desc: Juvenile delinquent Mikey schemes to steal church offerings, but a real thief gets there first. When the money goes missing, Mikey helps expose the deceitful Pastor, earns a reward, and uses it to help a sick child.

programme.title: Teen's First Job Goes Very Wrong
programme.desc: Teen Lamar attempts dangerous TikTok stunts to gain followers and win Lisa's attention. A near-fatal challenge lands him in the hospital, forcing him to shift his focus to mental health and genuine connection, leading to real success.

programme.title: Girl Denies Nerd In Front Of School
programme.desc: Arrogant Raji snubs Mario, her secret admirer, for popular Davis. After a disastrous Valentine's date exposes Davis's true colors and leaves her with a huge bill, Raji learns humility and accepts Mario's kindness.

programme.title: Nerdy Kid Becomes Basketball Champion
programme.desc: A former NBA player, Darrell, loses his way after an injury, facing unemployment, a breakup, and a DUI. Sentenced to coach a neurodivergent high school basketball team, he finds redemption, reconnects with his passion, and rebuilds his life.

programme.title: Girl Takes Down Frat Bros
programme.desc: After Bryce creates a sexist "Hot or Not" app, Daisy exposes his data theft and his father's corruption. The Dean is arrested, Bryce is expelled, and Daisy's father is reinstated.

programme.title: 12-Year-Old Knocks Out A Pro Fighter
programme.desc: After his mother abandons him to reform school, young Mike Tyson is discovered by trainer Cus D'Amato. Cus and Camille provide a stable home, transforming the troubled teen into a boxing champion.

programme.title: Teen Gives Hair Lice To The Whole School
programme.desc: After Andrew is bullied for a lice outbreak, rich kid Ricky posts a mocking video. Andrew mentors Ricky's sister in art, prompting a change of heart. Ricky repents, and the families bond as friends.

programme.title: Family Kicked Off Airplane For Fighting
programme.desc: After constant bickering ruins their trip, adopted foster kid Georgie runs away. His family finds his scrapbook about his past trauma, prompting them to reconcile and prove they can be a real home.

programme.title: Regular Teen Is Overnight Famous Star
programme.desc: David's daughter Aveline is a star held captive by her abusive manager Vivian. With help from allies, Aveline escapes. Vivian is arrested after Aveline's mother confesses to their past conspiracy.

programme.desc: Korean band TOMORROW X TOGETHER compares British and Korean food in this episode of Snack Wars! Soobin and Beomgyu make a mess opening Turtle Chips, Yeonjun loves British noodles, Kai rates Irn Bru, and Taehyun adores Monster Munch! Henry Golding joins us for the ultimate British vs Malaysian snacks battle. He tries iconic treats from both countries, shares why durian fruit is banned in parts of Asia, and raves about his favourite Malaysian Mamee noodles. Jackie Chan is trading martial arts for mouthfuls in the ultimate taste test: Snack Wars. In this fantastic episode of Agree to Disagree, Pedro Pascal and Vanessa Kirby debate the most important topics of our time... from whether the UK or US office is better, to who would win in a fight: The Fantastic Four or The Incredibles.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Mo Lea was just 20 when she was attacked by a man on her walk home in Leeds. Here, she tells us how she managed to survive and how she realised her attacker was Peter Sutcliffe, an infamous English serial killer, also known as the Yorkshire Ripper.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Patrick Foster's gambling addiction had catastrophic consequences on his career and family life. Here, he tells us about his internal battle with addiction, the millions he's placed in bets, and the vast sums of debt that he racked up as a result.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Lady Milena Grenfell-Baines was evacuated from ​​ Czechoslovakia to England in 1939. She reflects on the outbreak of World War II in Europe, her parents' brave decision to send her away, and her enduring connection with the man who saved her life.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: We sit down with popular YouTuber Callux to discuss his childhood battle with leukemia, how he got into YouTube, the launch of his business empire and trainers brand and his advocacy for mental well-being.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Douglas Robertson shares the incredible story of his family travelling around the world in a boat that eventually got shipwrecked in the Pacific Ocean after a killer whale attack, discussing how they survived and what he thinks of the experience now.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Waleed Khan, a survivor of the 2014 Peshawar School Massacre, opens up about being shot 8 times by the Taliban at his school in Pakistan. He discusses his road to recovery and the legacy of the 132 classmates who lost their lives on that tragic day.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this timely episode, actress, model and comedian Emily Atack discusses harassment of women and current protection policies.

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: Spurs fan Flav goes up against Chelsea fan Rory Jennings to debate the biggest arguments between the two London rivals, including whether Tottenham Hotspur will finish above Chelsea this season, and is Harry Kane the best Striker in Premier League history?

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: Spurs fan Flav goes up against Arsenal fan Ty of AFTV fame. Did Arsenal have the North London Derby postponed because they were scared? And will Spurs finish above Arsenal?

programme.title: Undercover Boss (Canada)
programme.desc: Freshii Boss, Matthew Corrin, opened his first store in 2005 and now he has 80, around the world. But when he dares to work undercover in his own Canadian franchises, he makes surprising discoveries.

programme.desc: The Chairman and CEO of Diamond Resorts International ignites a fire on a dangerous assignment.

programme.desc: FedEx Express Canada: Lisa Lisson, the first female president of FedEx Express Canada, goes undercover

programme.desc: Life on the road takes its toll when the bosses of North Americas biggest independent cabbies, Beck Taxi, go undercover.

programme.title: Undercover Boss (Canada)
programme.desc: Brandi Halls has a top job at cosmetics giant Lush. But she's cut down to size when she joins the frontline to work undercover and find ways to improve the company.

programme.desc: PJ's Pets is one of the nation's oldest pet store chains. New President Margaret Kordas may rattle some cages

programme.title: Nothing to Declare
programme.desc: A dog detector finds something in a Brazilian woman's luggage with unusual souvenirs, the compliance team has a search warrant in Brisbane that leads to an urgent man hunt, and a Vietnamese man in Sydney has a box full of nasty surprises.

programme.title: Nothing to Declare
programme.desc: An American travelling from Colombia wants to contact his wife when his luggage gets selected on suspicion of drugs. A Chinese woman has undeclared prohibited goods and a Chinese man in Brisbane has thousands of cigarettes.

programme.title: Nothing to Declare
programme.desc: Officers are concerned that a passenger is not being completely honest. Plus, a container from China may just blow the lid off a massive criminal syndicate.

programme.title: Nothing to Declare
programme.desc: Officers pull aside a woman arriving from the United States and discover drugs in her possession, and a professional MMA fighter with stacks of cash finds themselves suspected of supplying narcotics.

programme.title: A Match in Manhattan
programme.desc: When Celeste loses her teaching job, she becomes an au pair for an infamous New York property tycoon.

programme.title: Wildest New Zealand: Ocean Legacy
programme.desc: Spring on New Zealand's east coast is a time of promise for the New Zealand Fur Seal and the Norther Royal Albatross. They've returned to their land to breed. But harsh terrain, fickle weather and hungry predators will conspire to make lives difficult for them. Only the strongest will survive to carry forward their legacy.

programme.title: Animal Empires
programme.desc: Farm and domesticated animals are celebrated all over the world, but few stories tell of their sister species who live in the wild. These animals must fend for themselves beyond the fences of their domesticated kin.

programme.title: Animal Empires
programme.desc: Using shear numbers to claim a territory, some animal groups are considered pests. But their very survival may depend on finding a home where they're not welcome.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E10
programme.desc: Endora tells Samantha that Maurice, her father, is coming to visit. Endora warns Samantha that Maurice will be furious when he learns his daughter has married a mortal. Samantha, determined to stand up to her father, gets Darrin to stay in town on the night Maurice calls. Samantha tells Maurice that her husband is in Washington. The conversation about Darrin proceeds nicely until Maurice surmises Darrin is a mortal. Meanwhile, Darrin, who has been drinking with Larry Tate, phones Samantha and tells her he is coming home. When Darrin arrives, Maurice's fury hits its peak. Al-though Maurice admires Darrin's courage in facing up to him, he makes him disappear. Samantha, expressing her love for Darrin, pleads with Maurice to bring him back. Even Endora joins in Samantha's pleas. Although he tells them it will be extremely difficult, Maurice makes Darrin reappear. Before leaving, Maurice joins his family in a champagne toast. Im-pressed by the rare vintage, Maurice feels Darrin might be one of them after all.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E11
programme.sub-title: It Takes One To Know One
programme.desc: When Darrin starts searching for a "Miss Jasmine" for his firm's perfume account, Endora seizes the opportunity to sew doubt in Samantha's mind about her husband's loyalty. The search for a beautiful model ends when Jannine Fleur arrives. Both Larry and Darrin agree that Jannine is "Miss Jasmine." Samantha learns that Jannine is a witch whom Endora has asked to captivate Darrin. Samantha warns Jannine to keel away from Darrin. Jannine, intrigued, keeps on with her original assign-ment. Darrin uses Larry Tate as his chaperone to keep him from becoming involved with Jannine. Darrin and Larry go to Jannine's apartment to discuss details of the "Miss Jasmine" campaign. Jannine doctors the drinks. Larry falls asleep and Darrin becomes amorous. Just as Darrin starts to kiss Jannine, Samantha uses her witchcraft, and Darrin appears to Jannine as a large ugly fish. When the campaign is completed, Samantha turns the picture of "Miss Jasmine" into a caricature of Jannine.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E12
programme.desc: Larry and Louise Tate have been married for sixteen years and have no children. Louise asks Samantha to go with her to an obstetrician as tests have shown she is going to be a mother. Louise tells Samantha she is afraid to tell Larry since she believes he hates children. Larry, visiting his dentist at the medical center, sees Louise and Samantha enter the obstetrician's office. Thinking Samantha is going to have a baby, he tells Darrin, but cautions him not to say anything until Samantha tells him. In a reverie, Darrin visualizes his children as little witches. He comes to with a sinking feeling. Samantha invites the Tates to dinner. Both Larry and Darrin hover over Samantha, warning her not to exert herself. Louise is all but forgotten, but makes several unsuccessful attempts to tell Larry that he is to be a father. Finally, Samantha tells Larry. He is overjoyed. Although Darrin doesn't tell Samantha about his reverie, he is reassured when she tells him she hopes they have a child who looks just like him.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E13
programme.desc: Samantha's friend, Gertrude, a nice, plain-looking girl expresses her envy of the happiness Samantha has found in marriage. Although Darrin tries to avoid getting mixed up in matchmaking, Samantha persuades him to bring Kermit, a handsome artist, home to dinner to meet Gertrude. Kermit falls for Gertrude. Although Samantha will mot admit it, Darrin suspects Gertrude is a witch and tries to break up her romance with Kermit. Darrin arranges a meeting at a nightspot for Kermit with Susan, a former girl friend. There, Samantha uses witchcraft to get Susan into an argument with Kermit. Susan storms out, unable to recall what has happened. When Gertrude arrives, according to Samantha's plan, Kermit proposes to her.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E14
programme.desc: Darrin's parents pay their first visit to the Stephens home, Darrin's mother, Phyllis, hopes to find that his wife is a poor housekeeper. Soon after, Samantha's Aunt Clara comes down the chimney for an unexpected visit. Darrin is worried about the kind of impression Aunt Clara will make on his parents, but agrees with Samantha that they must make Aunt Clara feel welcome. Determined to help Samantha make a hit with her in-laws, Aunt Clara uses her witchcraft to whip up a feast for dinner. Thinking that Samantha has done the cooking, Phyllis becomes quite upset. Although Samantha warns him to be tactful, Darrin makes Aunt Clara feel she is not wanted. After Aunt Clara's de-parture, Samantha gets into an argument with Darrin, during which Phyllis learns Aunt Clara cooked the dinner. When Samantha admits she is not a good housekeeper, Phyllis, who felt she was being pushed aside, knows she is going to love her daughter-in-law. Darrin persuades Aunt Clare to return and the evening ends happily for all.

programme.title: Bewitched S8E251
programme.desc: Tabitha gets an assist from her grandmother when Endora casts a spell that turns her into a 7year-old super genius.

programme.title: Bewitched S8E252
programme.sub-title: A Good Turn Never Goes Unpunished
programme.desc: Samantha and Darrin argue over the use of witchcraft in an ad campaign.

programme.title: Bewitched S8E253
programme.desc: Old Chines proverb: Witch should blink softly and never touch cinnamon stick.

programme.title: Bewitched S8E254
programme.sub-title: The Truth, Nothing But The Truth, So Help Me Sam
programme.desc: Endora casts a "truth spell" on a gift from Darrin to Samantha that causes everyone embarrassment.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E1
programme.sub-title: I, Darrin, Take This Witch Samantha
programme.desc: Samantha and Darrin appear to be an ideally matched couple. Very much in love, they decide to marry. Darrin doesn't know that Samantha, is, of all things, a witch. On their wedding night, Samantha's mother, Endora, a witch, of course, visits her daughter. Regretting that her daughter has married a mortal, she is bent on breaking up the marriage. After pleading with her mother not to interfere, Samantha decides to tell her husband that he has unknowingly married a witch. To convince Darrin of her magic powers, Samantha performs a series of tricks. Darrin makes her promise never to practice her witchcraft again. Sheila, a former girl friend of Darrin's, invites the newly-weds to a dinner party. She makes every effort to embarrass Samantha before the guests. After enduring Sheila's snubs and insults, Samantha cannot resist evening the score. She employs her extraordinary powers to humiliate Sheila. Later, at home, Darrin rebukes his wife, but admits Sheila deserved the tricks played on her.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E3
programme.sub-title: It Shouldn't Happen to a Dog
programme.desc: Samantha gives a dinner party to impress Rex Barker, one of Darrin's clients. Rex brings along his date, Babs Livingston, but advances on Samantha in the garden when he gets drunk.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E4
programme.desc: Gladys Kravitz, a neighbor, is unable to convince her husband, Abner, that strange things seem to be happening at the Stephens' home. Gladys, June Foster, and Shirley Clyde, with their sons, visit the Stephens' home to welcome Samantha to the community. Gladys is frustrated in her attempts to point out to her friends the amazing number of objects which seem to appear and disappear. When the boys pester Endora, Samantha's mother, she uses magic to tie the three of them up. On leaving, Gladys tries to point out to her friends that it would be physically impossible for three boys to tie themselves up. Later Darrin returns home for his first meeting with Endora. Endora and Darrin soon engage in a heated argument about their opposing viewpoints on life. Endora threatens to turn Darrin into as artichoke. Later Samantha expresses her love for Darrin by announcing that if Endora had done so, she would also have turned herself into an artichoke.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E6
programme.desc: Darrin discovers that Samantha has been entertaining a guest each morning after he leaves for work. the guest is ten year old Marshall Burns. Marshall's mother is a widow, whose over-protectiveness has robbed Marshall of all his self-confidence. Darrin tells Samantha that she has no right to interfere with Mrs. Burns' upbringing of her son. Despite Marshall's belief that he is no good at anything, Samantha takes him to a Junior League ball game. Marshall has never been able to make the team. Floyd Kravitz, nephew of Gladys Kravitz, is the star player. With a little witchery on Samantha's part, Marshall becomes a triple threat. When his mother, fearful that he may be inured, forbids him to play, Marshall runs away from home. Samantha and Darrin drive Mrs. Burns to the ball field. There, Marshall, in his own right, has continued to star. How-ever, when Marshall gets into a tight spot, Darrin forbids Samantha from interfering. Marshall makes it on his own. Proud of her son, Mrs. Burns is not unhappy when Coach Gribben suggests that he visit the Burns home to give Marshall some extra coaching.

programme.title: U Turn
programme.desc: Motorists who take an illegal U-turn on a flyover die mysteriously. Radhika, who is interning to be a journalist, is investigating it. However, she becomes the prime suspect by a twist of fate. What happens next?

programme.title: Jodha Akbar
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: Happy Hours
programme.desc: Sit back, relax, and enjoy the funniest scenes from some of the most popular reality TV shows. Add some ventriloquism to the mix, and you have got the perfect recipe for a super fun.

programme.title: Miss Korea Ep.11
programme.desc: The intensive training for the Miss Korea finals begins, but Seoul contestants Oh Ji Young, Kim Jae Hee, Shin Sun Young, and Choi Soo Yeon, who share a room, get into a big fight over a trivial matter and receive penalty points. Before the finals, Ji Young refuses to sign a contract stating she must become the exclusive model for BaDa Cosmetics if selected as Miss Korea, and Kang Shik threatens that it will be difficult to become Miss Korea if she doesn't sign.

programme.title: Miss Korea Ep.12
programme.desc: The organizers of the Miss Korea pageant receive instructions that there is a problem with the Seoul 'Jin, Seon, Mi' monopolizing the main competition as the presidential election approaches. Director Ma and Director Yang move busily, but they sense an unusual atmosphere. During the training camp, Ji Young struggles due to Shin Sun Young's jealousy. Amidst her struggles, Yoon visits Ji Young.

programme.title: Miss Korea Ep.13
programme.desc: Director Ma, having learned about Jae Hee's father, listens to the whole story and then sends a message to Rep. Kim Suk Chul, Jae Hee's father, asking him to leave Jae Hee alone. Hyung Joon and the ViVi Cosmetics team prepare a press conference to expose the change in judges.

programme.title: Miss Korea Ep.14
programme.desc: Hyung Joon officially raises the issue of the judges. The organizers eventually accept Hyung Joon's proposal to replace the judges after the corruption scandal erupts. With the pre-screening also invalidated, the competition among the candidates for the gala night intensifies, and Oh Ji Young also does her best to prepare for the gala night. ViVi Cosmetics begins product manufacturing with the investment received from Yoon, and Yoon withdraws, upon learning this.

programme.title: Miss Korea Ep.15
programme.desc: Jae Hee goes into hiding after hearing her father Kim Suk Chul's proposal. Director Ma visits Kim Suk Chul and asks him to return Jae Hee, but instead faces a tax investigation. As the main competition begins, Oh Ji Young gradually starts to gain attention. However, due to Yoon's scheme, ViVi Cosmetics begins to face overdue promissory notes.

programme.title: Miss Korea Ep.16

programme.title: Strangers Again (English Dubbed) Ep.9

programme.title: Strangers Again (English Dubbed) Ep.12

programme.title: Hawaii: Paradise in the Pacific
programme.desc: In epsiode one we take a look at Kaua'i - the oldest island in the archipelago. Kaua'i's isolation for thousands of years led to an increased rate of evolution. In a relatively short time, new species are formed here, many animals and plants can only be found here. But they are in danger.

programme.title: Hawaii: Paradise in the Pacific
programme.desc: In episode two we take a look at Maui and Moloka'i. In the middle of the archipelago they form the heart of Hawaii. The second largest island of Hawai'i - Maui - is a true paradise for surfers. Archie Kalepa was one of the first big wave surfers and is still chasing the thrill today

programme.title: Our Big Blue Backyard
programme.desc: It's summer on New Zealand's Open Bay Islands, and the local population swells. Wily octopus, foraging crayfish and darting penguins are joined by over 4,000 New Zealand fur seals. Masterful divers, they successfully straddle two distinct neighborhoods: beneath the waves, where they play and eat – and these rocky outcrops, where they're born and mate. Mothers balance the demands of nursing pups, mating-keen males, and their own need to efficiently hunt and feed. Everyone here has new mouths to feed, including the scavenging Weka. Unable to fly nor swim, the species was introduced as food for sealers a century ago -- and has been marooned here ever since.

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: What seems calm and tranquil may not necessarily be so. Under the tranquility there maybe a vibrant dynamic world and above water there maybe dangers which are lurking at very corner.

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers

programme.title: Wild and Alive

programme.title: 15th Meridian East
programme.desc: Almost 11000 kilometres lie between the northernmost and southernmost point of the 15th meridian east. Here you will find extreme landscapes such as the shimmering heat of Africa or the eternal cold of northern Scandinavia. Five people from Spitsbergen, Namibia, Slovenia, Germany and Poland dedicate their lives to environmental protection.

programme.title: 15th Meridian East
programme.desc: This episode focuses on people from five countries who share a common passion: The production of their own food and food. What culinary treasures are hidden in the different regions, from Spitsbergen to Sweden, Austria, Poland and Chad?

programme.title: 15th Meridian East
programme.desc: The journey leads from the Norwegian Vesterålen to Chad, the Aeolian Islands and the Polish Giant Mountains. As different as the landscapes and cultures may be, all people are united in their love for their children and their desire to give something to tomorrow's generation.

programme.title: 15th Meridian East
programme.desc: What ideas are people on the 15th meridian east developing to shape the future and leave tomorrow's generations a home worth living in? This consequence leads us to four future designers. From the barren Namib Desert to the glacier worlds of Spitsbergen, Sicily and the Croatian Mediterranean.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives Hidden Places II - S2 E01
programme.desc: In the far west of India, unexpected predators roam: lions. Living freely in a human-inhabited area without fences, they occasionally prey on the livestock of the indigenous Maldhari people, who nevertheless take pride in sharing their region with these lions—a unique coexistence of humans and predators. In northern Gujarat, desert landscapes dominate, where semi-nomadic communities breed a unique camel breed capable of swimming: Karai camels swim up to 3km daily to mangrove islands for grazing.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives Hidden Places II - S2 E02
programme.desc: In Sabah, northern Borneo, flows the 560km-long Kinabatangan River. Nowhere else in Sabah are wild animals as easily spotted as along this river: orangutans, elephants, crocodiles, and proboscis monkeys. However, biodiversity is threatened as more rainforest gives way to palm oil plantations. Wildlife ventures into inhabited areas in search of food, leading to conflicts. Locals are fighting to preserve the rainforest and its unique wildlife, demonstrating that conservation and prosperity can coexist even in a modern society.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives Hidden Places II - S2 E03
programme.desc: The jungle in northern Vietnam is nearly impenetrable, with some areas never touched by humans. The remote rainforests of Pu Mat National Park serve as a refuge for endangered wildlife such as black bears, monkeys, and pangolins. Tuan, a biologist and bear specialist, embarks on an expedition to these untouched regions of the park in search of bears. The most hunted animal here is the pangolin, sought after for its scales believed to have medicinal properties and its meat considered a delicacy. A small Vietnamese conservation organization fights for the survival of this species.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives Hidden Places II - S2 E04
programme.desc: The Great Gobi National Park in southwestern Mongolia shelters one of the last populations of wild Bactrian camels, amid its ancient and mysterious desert landscape. With around 800 critically endangered animals, the Gobi remains one of the world's most sparsely inhabited and inhospitable regions, yet its allure is undeniable, offering a captivating backdrop for encounters with wild camels and stories of people deeply connected to nature.

programme.title: The Black Sea Coast

As different as the landscapes are the people - Old Believers who live as they did 300 years ago, young women who can be brokered through marriage agencies into a new life and children who learn German today to later connect to Western Europe.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Season 2018 begins with 14 strongest men in the world, all competing for the title. The competition kicks off in Norway. We'll see typical Viking disciplines, team events and world records in heavy conditions in the land of snow and ice. They will suffer, they will freeze and fight in this first competition of the year for the title that they will carry on their shoulders throughout whole year.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: For the first time in history, Strongman Champions League will set up competition in Abu Dhabi. The line-up of super athletes, who are part of the SCL, includes former world champions Dainis Zageris (Latvia) & Krzysztof Radzikowski (Poland), current world champion Matjaz Belsak (Slovenia) and biggest strongman in the World Sean O'Hagan (Ireland).

programme.title: Strongman Champions League

programme.title: NCT JNJM 'BOTH SIDES' MV
programme.desc: ‘BOTH SIDES' is an energetic hip-hop dance track that blends refined sound design, smooth drum beats, and witty vocals with sharp rap. Its lyrics playfully capture the idea of captivating someone with two contrasting charms, drawing them into a delightful dilemma between equally irresistible choices.

programme.title: EXO 'Crown' MV
programme.desc: 'Crown' is a hard dance song that fuses Atlanta trap drums, heavy metal guitars, and EDM synths to break genre boundaries. Siren effects and powerful vocals heighten the dramatic tension, while the lyrics liken a precious loved one to a crown coveted by many, conveying a desperate resolve to protect them at all costs.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The girls are driven to distraction by their frisky puppies frolicking all over Berry Bitty City! Full of energy and thinking that everything in town is a toy for them to play with, they cause comical mayhem wherever they go. Strawberry suggests the pups need a place of their own where they can play, a dog park! The girls decide to call in Huckleberry, who runs an animal hotel in Berry Big City, to help design the park.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The girls plan a formal afternoon lawn party tea to inaugurate their new dog park. Plum is in charge of decorations, Cherry music, and Strawberry snacks. There's even a giant, dog-shaped ice sculpture. As the girls get dressed, Raspberry puts the finishing touches on the high-fashion hats that will accompany their beautiful gowns. At last everything is ready. But when the gate opens... the puppies back away!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: To convince the dance-averse Huckleberry to attend the big masquerade ball at the dog park, Blueberry promises she'll stay by his side the whole evening and make sure he doesn't have to dance. But as the day of the ball dawns, Blueberry awakens with a bad cold. She doesn't know how to tell Huck that she can't go to the ball. Lemon and Raspberry misinterpret her sniffles, thinking she's so heartbroken to be disappointing Huck that she's crying!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: The Berry Biggest, Berry Baddest Bakeoff
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is abuzz as Berrykin Bloom introduces the biggest, juiciest, strangest fruit anyone has ever seen! It's the size of a house, shaped like a strawberry, colored like a watermelon and has a spiky pineapple top. "I call it the sparklestrawwaterpineberry!" says Berrykin Bloom. Princess Berrykin declares it the greatest achievement in Berryculture she's ever witnessed.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Lemon and Raspberry hire twins Sweet & Sour to help out in Strawberry's café, so Strawberry will have time to appear in an internet fashion contest.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Lemon and Raspberry's fashion podcast is saved by Apple, then almost sabotaged by Sweet and Sour when Lemon's "mood hair" runs amok, acting like the bickering twins, and the twins' comical argument is accidentally broadcast on the "berrynet."

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When Sour wishes she could have a birthday all her very own, her twin sister Sweet grants her wish by forgoing celebrating her birthday. But what begins as a day that Sour has always dreamed of quickly becomes a disappointment when she misses her twin. With Strawberry's help, Sour gives her birthday back to Sweet with a special surprise.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When a comedy of errors causes Orange, Plum and Cherry to arrive late to their campout, they start off their annual tradition of telling tall-tales around the campfire.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: At the girls' campout, Sour launches into a whopper of a yarn about the adventures she and Sweet had in the "Berry Deep Dark Forest." She tries to get Sweet to participate in spinning the tale, but Sour's over-the-top performance leaves Sweet behind. Toward the end, Sour graciously changes the story to pull Sweet into it, giving Sweet the opportunity to toss in an ad lib that makes a nice topper to Sour's story.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Friends from all over the world descend on Strawberryland to take part in the first Great Friendship Festival. Strawberry thinks the festival will provide a wonderful opportunity to see the world through different eyes.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

Everyone is milling about searching for it on their own when Blueberry points out that the rules say the BerryFest Princess is in charge of the search. The girls turn to her for direction and she points them where she thinks the berry might be.
